title: 20cm and 22cm Non Stick Chip Pan with Lid & Wire Basket Aluminium Deep Fryer Saucepan Made in UK (8 Inches - 20cm)
features: Srendi MADE IN UK Manufactured from Strong, Sturdy Aluminium Non-Stick Chip Pan
Comes Complete With Lid, Basket and Pan
Ideal for All Your Deep Frying Needs
Deep Carbon Steel Bowl, Heat Resistant Handle
Suitable For Gas, Electric and Solid Hotplates. Size Available 20cm 8 Inches and 22cm 9 Inches.
description: Product description Experience hassle-free deep frying with our premium Srendi deep fryer, crafted from robust, durable Aluminium and made in the UK. This 20cm (8 inches) deep fryer comes complete with a lid, wire basket, and a deep carbon steel bowl, ensuring all your frying needs are met. Its heat-resistant handle and suitability for gas, electric, and solid hotplates make it a versatile addition to your kitchen. With a 3L oil capacity, it's perfect for frying up your favourite foods. Easy to clean and maintain, this fryer is a must-have for any home cook.
